scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @you-u/shared run build && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @you-u/api dev" "pnpm --filter @you-u/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @you-u/shared run build && pnpm --filter @you-u/api run build && pnpm --filter @you-u/web run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @you-u/shared run typecheck && pnpm --filter @you-u/shared run build && pnpm --filter @you-u/api run typecheck && pnpm --filter @you-u/web run typecheck
